app.name: Influency
app.tagline: Run your brand-deal business in one place.

auth.title: Welcome back
auth.subtitle: Sign in to your private Influency workspace.

errors.password: Password must be at least 6 characters.
errors.name: Enter your name.
errors.signIn: We could not sign you in. Check your email and password.
errors.signUp: We could not create the account. Try again.
errors.google: Google sign-in could not start. Try again.
errors.verify: We could not verify that code. Check the email and code.

verifyEmail.title: Verify your email
verifyEmail.subtitle: Enter the 6-digit code InsForge sent to your inbox.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Your workspace is ready. Deal data arrives in the next chunks.
dashboard.emptyBody: Brands, deals, payments, meetings, and Snap analytics will fill this dashboard as the next chunks land.
dashboard.profileReady: Profile ready. Reminder lead time: {{minutes}} minutes.

brands.title: Brands
brands.subtitle: The companies and agencies you work with.

empty.body: No brands yet. Add the companies you work with to start tracking deals.

errors.save: We could not save this brand. Try again.
errors.load: We could not load your brands. Refresh to try again.

detail.notFound: That brand could not be found.
detail.noDeals: No deals for this brand yet.

deals.title: Deals
deals.subtitle: Track each brand deal from agreed to posted.
deals.paymentPlaceholder: Payment tracking arrives in a later chunk.
deals.snapPlaceholder: Linked Snap report arrives in a later chunk.

empty.body: No deals yet. Add your first deal to start tracking deliverables and status.
empty.needBrand: Add a brand first, then you can create deals.

errors.title: Enter a title.
errors.deliverables: Add at least one deliverable with a valid count.
errors.amount: Enter an amount greater than zero.
errors.save: We could not save this deal. Try again.
errors.load: We could not load your deals. Refresh to try again.

payments.title: Payments
payments.subtitle: Track money expected and received across your deals.

empty.body: No payments yet. Add a payment to a deal to start tracking what you're owed.
empty.needDeal: Create a deal first, then you can add payments to it.

errors.amount: Enter an amount greater than zero.
errors.save: We could not save this payment. Try again.
errors.load: We could not load your payments. Refresh to try again.
